Related

Program

Üsküdar University Hair Care and Beauty Services Program Laboratory is a modern application area that offers students the opportunity to develop their professional knowledge and skills. The laboratory, where professional training is provided in many areas such as hair care, skin care, make-up applications, epilation techniques, aims to provide equipped and innovative individuals to the sector.

In this laboratory equipped with the latest technology equipment, students gain the competence needed in the sector by putting their theoretical knowledge into practice. Practices carried out in the company of expert academicians form the basis of a successful career in the beauty and care sector. This laboratory, where science and aesthetics meet, is an important center that trains future beauty experts.
